notes: Original zh_TW authoring for the cognitive_clarity flagship brand, arc 1 of 4 ('obsession seed' phase per ASSIGNMENT_MATRIX.tsv) — 12-episode arc adapting config/source_of_truth/manga_story_strategies/psychological_thriller_strategies.yaml strategy_01 ('The Case File That Keeps Revising Itself') paced across a full episode arc rather than a single episode. Protagonist Su Yaqing (Taiwan-localized variant of character_pool.protagonist 'Iris Halloran'), MRT Operations Control Center analyst. Each chapter independently verified against check_manga_arc_storyboard.py, check_manga_story_authored.py, and validate_story_excellence.py --production. acceptance_layer: authored_candidate — gate PASS is not a bestseller or blind-read claim.

modern_reader_context.market_surface_rule: Use MRT commute with EasyCard tap, scooter mobility, night-market ritual, bubble-tea app ordering, buxiban (cram school) culture, LINE-dominant group chat, 7-Eleven/FamilyMart iBon-kiosk and City Cafe routines, and webtoon/comic-app reading habits, favoring an atmospheric literary register over clinical self-help framing.
modern_reader_context.audience_story_rule: Treat online identity, economic pressure, burnout, social performance, fandom, romance boundaries, and self-definition as ordinary life texture.
modern_reader_context.genre_relevance_rule: Modern mystery must turn screenshots, transit records, edits, logs, or platform behavior into evidence without becoming a tech explainer.

catalyst.logline: 西門站C出口的一筆悠遊卡刷卡出站紀錄,找不到對應的進站紀錄；監視器裡的身影模糊卻精確地避開每一個能辨識臉孔的角度,而值班換班的倒數時鐘,把控制室的日常變成她必須先解決才能離開的謎題。
catalyst.genre_transmutation: 一筆平凡的悠遊卡刷卡異常,被雅晴的職業精確度重新讀成謎案的第一條證據；換班倒數計時,把值班室的日常壓力變成她必須先解決才能離開的謎題。

modern_reader_context.craft_directive: Fuse the genre engine with a contemporary reader-world entrypoint. Market=zh_TW; audience=gen_z. Use catalyst 'gate_c_ecard_no_entry_tap'. Market surface rule per config/manga/modern_reader_story_doctrine.yaml zh_TW. Use concrete Taiwan objects and social/system pressure on page one; do not name-drop trends.

catalyst.logline: 雅晴調閱台北車站當晚的封存畫面,發現同一把傘、同一種步態的身影,出現在一個以正常通勤時間根本無法抵達的時間點；周德昌隨口一句公車誤點的抱怨,被她整個吃進時間軸的推算裡。
catalyst.genre_transmutation: 一句關於公車誤點的日常抱怨,被她的分析習慣重新讀成時間軸上的變數；一張需要跨部門簽核的調閱申請單,讓她的執念第一次留下看得見的行政足跡。

catalyst.logline: 雅晴用住處附近7-11的iBon列印出三個異常事件的時間軸,貼上租屋處的牆；手搖飲app在她沒注意的情況下自動幫她點了連續第七天一樣的「去冰半糖」,而值班主管開始要求她在稽核前提出結論。
catalyst.genre_transmutation: iBon列印出的時間軸,把她私人的執念第一次變成貼在牆上、看得見的物證；手搖飲app的自動下單,暴露出她連續多日沒有真正做過一個清醒的選擇。

catalyst.logline: 值班群組裡一則普通的換班訊息,被雅晴的辦案邏輯讀成第三個時間點的線索；而月底稽核的結案期限,把她的私人執念第一次寫進正式的加班紀錄裡。
catalyst.genre_transmutation: 一則同事聊換班的LINE群組訊息,被她的邏輯重新讀成證據；一張加班紀錄表,讓她的執念第一次變成看得見的、可被稽核的數字。

modern_reader_context.craft_directive: Fuse the genre engine with a contemporary reader-world entrypoint. Market=zh_TW; audience=gen_z. Use catalyst 'line_chat_shift_swap_misread_as_clue'.
